title: Vertical Line Symbols: Copy & Paste | ‖ │ ┃ Pipe & Bar Characters
meta_description: Copy the vertical line symbol in every Unicode form — pipe |, double bar ‖, box-drawing │ ┃, and heavy dingbat bars. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Every pipe, bar, and vertical rule Unicode offers — from the keyboard | to heavy ❚ bars. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: The vertical line symbol — also called the pipe, bar, or vertical slash — separates items in headlines, bios, navigation menus, and code. Beyond the keyboard pipe |, Unicode includes double bars, dashed box-drawing verticals, heavy dingbat bars, and mathematical divides-by characters. Pick the exact weight and style of vertical line you need below; each one is a single copyable character.

sections.label: Pipes
sections.intro: The standard vertical bar and its direct relatives, including full-width and letter forms.

sections.intro: Light, heavy, dashed, and double verticals from the box-drawing block — ideal for dividers and frames.
